Legend

HONEST: self-contained canvas orthographic 3D globe; bounded :representative seed. The kami-engine WASM globe (shared with kanae/shibuya) is the deferred integration — same cable-resilience.json contract. Live ingest G7-gated. ADR-2606012600.
